function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0007
alias: helios_backfill_process_pack
issued_on: 2025-12-21
total_eur: 760
counterparty: Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH
project: Helios Workflow Sprint
related_entity: Claudia Reiter
lines:
  - item: workflow mapping and intake audit
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 260
    line_eur: 260
  - item: checklist rewrite and rollout pack
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 390
    line_eur: 390
  - item: staff follow-up support
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 110
    line_eur: 110
---
# Helios process pack invoice

```text
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| field          | value                          |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                        |
| invoice_number | INV-0007                       |
| alias          | helios_backfill_process_pack   |
| issued_on      | 2025-12-21                     |
| total_eur      | 760                            |
| counterparty   | Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH |
| project        | Helios Workflow Sprint         |
| related_entity | Claudia Reiter                 |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                               | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | workflow mapping and intake audit  | 1   | 260      | 260      |
| 2 | checklist rewrite and rollout pack | 1   | 390      | 390      |
| 3 | staff follow-up support            | 1   | 110      | 110      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                              |     |          | 760      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

A backfilled invoice from the middle phase when the work started looking like an actual office deliverable set.

next_step.current_state: Structured frontmatter write completed successfully on the invoice file. Outbox-writing reactive note is not applicable to this non-outbox finance record. Next required step is deleting processed inbox item per workflow.
next_step.observation: Wrote updated invoice file with YAML frontmatter and preserved original body content below it.

next_step.current_state: Task completed: processed next inbox item, migrated invoice to schema frontmatter, and deleted inbox request per workflow.

function.message: Completed the next inbox item. I OCR-structured `50_finance/invoices/2025_12_21__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md` by adding invoice YAML frontmatter per the finance schema and preserved the full original note body below frontmatter with a focused diff. Then I deleted the processed inbox file `00_inbox/000_next-task.md`.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read/context), inspected 99_system before task work, applied OCR and migration workflows, used schema-defined invoice fields, preserved original body verbatim below frontmatter, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asked for OCR/frontmatter extraction on the specified invoice. The target file contained all required invoice schema fields and line items, enabling exact YAML frontmatter extraction without guessing. Workflow docs instructed deleting the inbox item after successful structured-record maintenance, which was done.
